subject: session setup
fact: Kostadis and Nikhil Reddy reconnected via Discord to confirm audio and screen-sharing setup before the session.
source_quote: Kostadis and Nikhil Reddy reconnected via Discord and confirmed their audio and screen-sharing setup before beginning the session

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis is the Dungeon Master running the session.
source_quote: run by Kostadis as Dungeon Master

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy is the player controlling the character Zenvon.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy as the player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon is a character controlled by Nikhil Reddy.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy as the player controlling the character Zenvon

subject: Phandalin
fact: The session is set in the town of Phandalin.
source_quote: set in the town of Phandalin

subject: Stonehill Tavern
fact: The party gathered intelligence at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: The party gathered critical intelligence at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Gundren
fact: Gundren is a patron who has been captured.
source_quote: rescuing their patron, Gundren, who had been captured

subject: Gundren
fact: The party was planning to rest before rescuing Gundren.
source_quote: planning to rest before rescuing their patron, Gundren

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands are a gang identified as a major threat operating out of Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: The Red Brands gang was identified as a major threat operating out of Tresendar Manor

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands.
source_quote: with a leader named Glasstaff

subject: mysterious obelisk
fact: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic, minds, memory, and transformation was introduced as a potential larger storyline thread.
source_quote: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic, minds, memory, and transformation was introduced as a potential larger storyline thread

subject: goblin ambush
fact: The party successfully ambushed and defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave.
source_quote: The party successfully ambushed and defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave

subject: cave scouting
fact: The party began scouting the cave interior after the ambush.
source_quote: then began scouting the cave interior

subject: goblins
fact: Two goblins and a goblin boss were defeated outside a cave.
source_quote: defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave

subject: goblin boss
fact: A goblin boss was defeated outside a cave.
source_quote: defeated two goblins and a goblin boss outside a cave

subject: cave encounter
fact: Zenvon came face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave at the end of the session.
source_quote: Zenvon coming face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave

subject: giant poisonous snake
fact: A giant poisonous snake was encountered by Zenvon inside the cave.
source_quote: Zenvon coming face-to-face with a giant poisonous snake inside the cave

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen Stonehill is the broad-shouldered young human owner of the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: Toblen Stonehill, the broad-shouldered young human owner of the tavern

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen described Gundren as a merchant who brought good business to the town.
source_quote: Toblen described Gundren as a merchant who brought good business to the town

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen expressed concern about Gundren's disappearance.
source_quote: and expressed concern about his disappearance

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen deflected questions about Gundren's enemies, stating he did not want trouble in his common room.
source_quote: Toblen deflected, saying he did not want trouble in his common room

subject: Tell Dendar
fact: Tell Dendar was a man killed by the Red Brands in broad daylight.
source_quote: the Red Brands had killed a man named Tell Dendar in broad daylight

subject: Tell Dendar murder
fact: The Red Brands killed Tell Dendar in broad daylight.
source_quote: the Red Brands had killed a man named Tell Dendar in broad daylight

subject: Dendar family disappearance
fact: The wife and children of Tell Dendar vanished after his murder.
source_quote: after which the man's wife and children vanished

subject: Toblen Stonehill
fact: Toblen lowered his voice when sharing information about the Red Brands.
source_quote: He lowered his voice when sharing this information

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands drink at the Sleeping Giant tap house.
source_quote: the Red Brands drink at the Sleeping Giant tap house

subject: Sleeping Giant
fact: The Sleeping Giant tap house is located on Phandalin's Main Street.
source_quote: located on Phandalin's Main Street

subject: Elsa
fact: Elsa is a sharp-eyed dwarf bartender at the Stonehill Tavern.
source_quote: Elsa, a sharp-eyed dwarf bartender at the Stonehill Tavern

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy bought Elsa a drink to open a conversation.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy: Bought Elsa a drink to open conversation.

subject: Elsa
fact: Elsa mentioned her sister is a scholar in Neverwinter and is the pride of the family.
source_quote: Elsa mentioned her sister is a scholar in Neverwinter and is the pride of the family.

subject: Veyra
fact: Veyra noted that her mentor, Professor Orryn Voss, may have known Elsa's sister.
source_quote: Veyra (party NPC) noted that her mentor, Professor Orryn Voss, may have known Elsa's sister.

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss had disappeared in Phandalin.
source_quote: Recalled that Professor Orryn Voss had disappeared in Phandalin.

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss came to Phandalin believing there were black stone fragments from a large obelisk.
source_quote: Professor Orryn Voss came to Phandalin believing there were black stone fragments from a large obelisk.

subject: blue candle
fact: A blue candle reacted to obelisk fragments and psionic magic.
source_quote: A blue candle reacted to obelisk fragments and psionic magic.

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss feared the obelisk was connected to minds, memory, and transformation.
source_quote: He feared the obelisk was connected to minds, memory, and transformation

subject: Professor Orryn Voss
fact: Professor Orryn Voss warned never to let anyone assemble the fragments.
source_quote: and warned never to let anyone assemble the fragments.

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy saw what appeared to be a shadow of an obelisk when the wagon hit a rock on the road to Phandalin.
source_quote: on the road to Phandalin, he had seen what appeared to be a shadow of an obelisk when the wagon hit a rock.

subject: Pip
fact: Pip mentioned hearing a whisper saying "returned."
source_quote: Party NPC Pip mentioned hearing a whisper saying "returned"

subject: Sister Maela
fact: Sister Maela felt a chill in her holy symbol at the same moment Pip heard the whisper.
source_quote: Sister Maela felt a chill in her holy symbol at the same moment.

subject: Elsa
fact: Elsa recommended speaking with Daran Edermath, the orchard keeper and retired adventurer, for more information about the area.
source_quote: Elsa recommended speaking with Daran Edermath, the orchard keeper and retired adventurer, for more information about the area.

subject: Freda
fact: Freda is a slight gnomish woman with silver-streaked hair and round spectacles.
source_quote: Freda, a slight gnomish woman with silver-streaked hair and round spectacles.

subject: Freda
fact: Freda appeared nervous and quietly angry.
source_quote: Freda appeared nervous and quietly angry.

subject: Freda
fact: Freda stated she knew who was behind Gundren's disappearance — the Red Brands gang.
source_quote: She stated she knew who was behind Gundren's disappearance — the Red Brands gang.

subject: Freda
fact: Freda expressed that she wanted the Red Brands gone but did not want her neighbors hurt.
source_quote: Freda expressed that she wanted the Red Brands gone but did not want her neighbors hurt

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands bother everyone in town except Halia.
source_quote: the Red Brands bother everyone in town except Halia

subject: Halia
fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.
source_quote: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange

subject: Freda
fact: Freda suggested that anyone wanting to uncover who is behind the criminal activity should start at the Phandalin Miners Exchange.
source_quote: anyone wanting to uncover who is behind the criminal activity should start there.

subject: Tuck
fact: Tuck is Toblen's nine-year-old son.
source_quote: Tuck, Toblen's nine-year-old son.

subject: Carp Alderleaf
fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a tunnel leading into the woods.
source_quote: his friend Carp Alderleaf had discovered a tunnel leading into the woods

subject: Red Brands
fact: The Red Brands nearly caught Carp Alderleaf.
source_quote: the Red Brands (referred to as "red cloaks") had nearly caught him.

subject: Carp Alderleaf
fact: Carp Alderleaf's mother forbade him from going near the tunnel.
source_quote: Carp's mother forbade him from going near it

subject: Tuck
fact: Tuck offered to show the party where the tunnel is.
source_quote: Tuck offered to show the party where the tunnel is.

subject: Tuck
fact: Tuck expressed concern about people who get taken not always coming back.
source_quote: Tuck expressed concern about people who get taken not always coming back

subject: Narth
fact: Narth is an older weathered human man.
source_quote: Narth, an older weathered human man.

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele had returned to town limping and pale.
source_quote: Sister Garaele had returned to town limping and pale

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele refused to explain what had happened.
source_quote: refused to explain what had happened

subject: Sister Garaele
fact: Sister Garaele likely refused to explain what happened to protect the townspeople.
source_quote: likely to protect the townspeople.

subject: Narth
fact: Narth suggested that Sister Garaele might be willing to speak with temple folk like Sister Maela.
source_quote: Narth suggested that Sister Garaele might be willing to speak with temple folk like Sister Maela.

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy agreed to try to speak with Sister Garaele.
source_quote: Nikhil Reddy: Agreed to try to speak with Sister Garaele.

subject: Gundren's disappearance
fact: The Red Brands gang is behind Gundren's disappearance.
source_quote: She stated she knew who was behind Gundren's disappearance — the Red Brands gang.

subject: obelisk fragments
fact: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic is a significant background threat.
source_quote: A mysterious obelisk connected to psionic magic is a significant background threat.

subject: Sister Garaele's injury
fact: Sister Garaele has been injured under unknown circumstances.
source_quote: Sister Garaele has been injured under unknown circumstances

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar is a lean human miner with a dusty gray beard.
source_quote: Lenar, a lean human miner with a dusty gray beard

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar spoke loudly about the general lawlessness of the roads.
source_quote: Lenar spoke loudly about the general lawlessness of the roads

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar mentioned goblins, bandits, orcs, and the Red Brands as threats on the roads.
source_quote: goblins, bandits, orcs, and the Red Brands

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar criticized the town master, Harbin Wester, for doing nothing.
source_quote: criticized the town master, Harbin Wester, for doing nothing

subject: Harbin Wester
fact: Harbin Wester is the town master of Phandalin.
source_quote: Harbin Wester as the useless town master

subject: Harbin Wester
fact: Lenar described Harbin Wester as hiding behind notices and wax seals.
source_quote: hides behind notices and wax seals

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar confirmed the party had been attacked on the road.
source_quote: Lenar confirmed the party had been attacked on the road

subject: Lenar
fact: Lenar referenced Gundren's capture during the conversation.
source_quote: referencing Gundren's capture

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath is a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old.
source_quote: Daran Edermath, a retired drow adventurer over 500 years old

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath formerly served as a marshal and herald on the Dragon Coast.
source_quote: formerly served as a marshal and herald on the Dragon Coast

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath expressed enthusiasm upon meeting the party.
source_quote: Daran expressed enthusiasm upon meeting the party

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath praised Pip's dedication to doing good.
source_quote: praised Pip's dedication to doing good

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath confirmed concern about the Red Brands.
source_quote: Daran confirmed concern about the Red Brands

subject: Glasstaff
fact: Daran Edermath stated that someone needs to confront the Red Brands' leader, Glasstaff.
source_quote: someone needs to confront their leader, Glasstaff

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Daran Edermath revealed that the Red Brands' safehouse is located beneath Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: the Red Brands' safehouse is located beneath Tresendar Manor

subject: Tresendar Manor
fact: Tresendar Manor is a rundown building past the Sleeping Giant.
source_quote: a rundown building past the Sleeping Giant

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands at Tresendar Manor.
source_quote: estimated between 3 and 10 Red Brands at Tresendar Manor

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath mentioned prospectors in the hills northwest of Phandalin have been chased from Old Owl Well by undead creatures.
source_quote: prospectors in the hills northwest of Phandalin have been chased from the ruins known as Old Owl Well by undead creatures

subject: Old Owl Well
fact: Old Owl Well is an ancient watchtower of the magical empire Netheril.
source_quote: an ancient watchtower of the magical empire Netheril

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath expressed concern about dangerous magic at Old Owl Well.
source_quote: expressed concern about dangerous magic there

subject: boots of striding and springing
fact: Daran Edermath offered boots of striding and springing as a reward for investigating Old Owl Well.
source_quote: Daran offered boots of striding and springing as a reward

subject: Daran Edermath
fact: Daran Edermath urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests.
source_quote: Daran urged the party to prioritize rescuing Gundren before pursuing side quests

subject: Shrine of Luck
fact: The Shrine of Luck is Phandalin's only temple.
source_quote: Phandalin's only temple, the Shrine of Luck

subject: Tymora
fact: The Shrine of Luck is dedicated to Tymora, the god of good luck and fortune.
source_quote: dedicated to Tymora, the god of good luck and fortune

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The shrine is tended by a zealous young elf acolyte.
source_quote: tended by a zealous young elf acolyte

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The elf acolyte recognized the party as those searching for Gundren.
source_quote: recognized the party as those searching for Gundren

subject: blessing at Shrine of Luck
fact: The elf acolyte blessed the party.
source_quote: The acolyte blessed the party

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The elf acolyte indicated she had another quest for the party upon their return.
source_quote: indicated she had another quest for them upon their return

subject: elf acolyte
fact: The elf acolyte would not assign the quest until Gundren's situation was resolved.
source_quote: would not assign it until Gundren's situation was resolved

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis explained that players accumulate experience points, coins, treasure, and magic items through quests.
source_quote: Players accumulate experience points, coins, treasure, and magic items through both main and side quests

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis warned that delaying the rescue of Gundren carries real risk.
source_quote: Delaying the rescue of Gundren carries real risk

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis stated that Gundren's captors are extracting information from him.
source_quote: his captors are extracting information from him

subject: Kostadis
fact: Kostadis warned that Gundren's captors may decide to kill him once they have what they need.
source_quote: may decide to kill him once they have what they need

subject: Nikhil Reddy
fact: Nikhil Reddy decided to prioritize rescuing Gundren over pursuing side quests.
source_quote: Decided to prioritize rescuing Gundren over pursuing side quests

subject: party decision
fact: The party chose to proceed toward the goblin cave to rescue Gundren as the primary objective.
source_quote: The party chose to proceed toward the goblin cave to rescue Gundren as the primary objective

subject: travel to Goblin Cave
fact: The party traveled along the goblin trail toward the cave where Gundren is believed to be held.
source_quote: The party traveled along the goblin trail toward the cave where Gundren is believed to be held

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon successfully avoided a hidden pit trap with a Dexterity saving throw.
source_quote: Zenvon successfully avoided a hidden pit trap with a Dexterity saving throw

subject: Pip
fact: Pip failed a Dexterity saving throw against a hidden snare and was suspended 10 feet above the ground.
source_quote: Pip failed a Dexterity saving throw against a hidden snare and was suspended 10 feet above the ground

subject: trap encounter
fact: Two traps were encountered on the trail.
source_quote: Two traps were encountered on the trail

subject: Goblin Cave
fact: The party arrived at a hillside cave entrance with a shallow stream and dense briar thickets.
source_quote: The party arrived at the cave entrance, described as a hillside cave with a shallow stream and dense briar thickets

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon scouted ahead using stealth and rolled successfully.
source_quote: Zenvon scout ahead using stealth (rolled successfully)

subject: goblins
fact: Zenvon spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post within the briar thickets.
source_quote: Zenvon spotted two goblins and one goblin boss in a hollowed-out lookout post within the briar thickets

subject: surprise round
fact: The party successfully passed stealth checks and achieved a surprise round.
source_quote: The party successfully passed stealth checks and achieved a surprise round

subject: combat initiative
fact: Goblins rolled 21 for initiative but were surprised, granting the party a free first round.
source_quote: goblins rolled 21 but were surprised, granting the party a free first round

subject: Zenvon crossbow shot
fact: Zenvon missed with a crossbow shot after rolling a natural 1 in the surprise round.
source_quote: Zenvon missed with a crossbow shot (rolled a natural 1) in the surprise round

subject: Veyra magic missile
fact: Veyra fired a magic missile at the goblin boss, dealing 3 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra fired a magic missile at the goblin boss, dealing 3 points of damage

subject: goblin boss charge
fact: The goblin boss charged Pip and missed.
source_quote: The goblin boss charged Pip and missed

subject: Zenvon dagger strike
fact: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger, killing one goblin outright in a decisive strike.
source_quote: Zenvon rolled a natural 20 with a dagger, killing one goblin outright in a decisive strike

subject: Veyra firebolt
fact: Veyra fired a Firebolt, killing the second goblin with 5 points of damage.
source_quote: Veyra fired a Firebolt, killing the second goblin (5 points of damage)

subject: goblin boss scimitar attacks
fact: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar and missed both times.
source_quote: The goblin boss attacked Pip twice with a scimitar and missed both times

subject: Zenvon short sword hit
fact: Zenvon hit the goblin boss with a short sword for 9 points of damage.
source_quote: hit with a short sword (9 points of damage)

subject: Sister Maela mace hit
fact: Sister Maela hit the goblin boss with her mace for 6 points of damage.
source_quote: Sister Maela hit the boss with her mace for 6 points of damage

subject: goblin boss death
fact: Veyra fired another Firebolt, killing the goblin boss.
source_quote: Veyra fired another Firebolt, killing the goblin boss

subject: combat conclusion
fact: All three enemies were defeated and no party members took damage.
source_quote: All three enemies — two goblins and the goblin boss — were defeated

subject: scimitar
fact: Looting the bodies produced a scimitar which Zenvon added to his inventory.
source_quote: produced a scimitar and a javelin, which Zenvon added to his inventory

subject: javelin
fact: Looting the bodies produced a javelin which Zenvon added to his inventory.
source_quote: produced a scimitar and a javelin, which Zenvon added to his inventory

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon's dagger roll of 7 was a miss against the goblin boss's armor class of 17.
source_quote: Zenvon's dagger roll of 7 (total) was a miss

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon's short sword roll of 20 was a hit against the goblin boss's armor class of 17.
source_quote: short sword roll of 20 (total) was a hit

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon only has a +1 to hit with the javelin due to lack of proficiency.
source_quote: without proficiency, Zenvon only has a +1 to hit with the javelin

subject: encumbrance rule
fact: Kostadis does not enforce encumbrance rules in this campaign.
source_quote: Kostadis does not enforce them, preferring to focus on gameplay over resource accounting

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon scouted further into the cave after the combat.
source_quote: Zenvon scouted further into the cave after the combat

subject: cave threats
fact: Wolves, a dark passage, and a giant snake were mentioned as threats in the cave.
source_quote: Wolves, Dark Passage, and Giant Snake

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave but passed them undetected.
source_quote: Zenvon spotted three wolves chained in the cave but passed them undetected

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon approached a rubble-choked passage and came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake.
source_quote: As Zenvon approached the passage, he came face-to-face with a giant coiled poisonous snake

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon had a stealth roll of 23 which meant the snake had not yet noticed him.
source_quote: Thanks to his stealth roll of 23, the snake had not yet noticed him

subject: Zenvon
fact: Zenvon decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party.
source_quote: Decided to slowly tiptoe back to the party

fact: Sister Maela is a dwarf who has darkvision.
source_quote: Sister Maela (dwarf) and Veyra (tiefling) do

fact: Veyra possesses a blue candle that provides light.

fact: Gundren is currently held by captors who may kill him if they stop extracting information.
source_quote: Gundren's captors will eventually stop trying to extract information from him and may kill him

fact: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded and is not speaking about what happened.
source_quote: Sister Garaele returned to town wounded and is not speaking about what happened

fact: Halia works at the Phandalin Miners Exchange and has an unclear relationship with the Red Brands.
source_quote: Halia at the Phandalin Miners Exchange has not been visited, and her relationship with the Red Brands is unclear

fact: Carp Alderleaf discovered a hidden tunnel.

fact: Glasstaff is the leader of the Red Brands gang.

fact: The Red Brands gang continues to operate freely in Phandalin.

source_quote: giant coiled poisonous snake

fact: The cave contains a rubble-choked passage.
